translations.landing.wasm.code.subtitle: Xem truoc cach su dung de dang
translations.landing.wasm.code.title: Tich hop don gian
translations.landing.wasm.features.crossBrowserDesc: Hoat dong tren Chrome, Firefox, Safari va Edge. Mot module, moi trinh duyet.
translations.landing.wasm.features.modulesDesc: Cung module manh me nhu CLI. Xu ly chuoi, mang, du lieu va nhieu hon nua.
translations.landing.wasm.features.nearNative: Toc do gan nhu ban dia
translations.landing.wasm.features.nearNativeDesc: WebAssembly chay voi toc do gan nhu ung dung ban dia. Thuc thi quy trinh phuc tap khong bi giat.
translations.landing.wasm.features.offlineDesc: Luu module vao bo nho dem va chay ngoai tuyen. Hoan hao cho PWA.
translations.landing.wasm.features.sandboxedDesc: Chay trong sandbox cua trinh duyet. Khong truy cap he thong tap tin tru khi duoc cho phep.
translations.landing.wasm.features.subtitle: Tu dong hoa trong trinh duyet voi WebAssembly
translations.landing.wasm.features.title: Sap co gi
translations.landing.wasm.features.zeroInstallDesc: Khong tai xuong, khong cai dat. Chi can import module va bat dau tu dong hoa.
translations.landing.wasm.hero.notifyDesc: Hay la nguoi dau tien biet khi module WebAssembly san sang.
translations.landing.wasm.hero.notifySuccess: Ban da trong danh sach! Chung toi se gui email khi san sang.
translations.landing.wasm.hero.subtitle: Chay quy trinh tu dong ngay trong trinh duyet. Khong can cai dat gi.
translations.landing.wasm.hero.title: Flyto2 WebAssembly
translations.landing.wasm.useCases.extensionsDesc: Xay dung tien ich Chrome/Firefox voi cac module tu dong hoa manh me.
translations.landing.wasm.useCases.pwaDesc: Ung dung web tien bo voi kha nang tu dong hoa ngoai tuyen day du.
translations.landing.wasm.useCases.subtitle: Hoan hao cho ung dung tren trinh duyet
translations.landing.wasm.useCases.title: Truong hop su dung
translations.landing.wasm.useCases.webAppsDesc: Them tinh nang tu dong hoa vao ung dung web ma khong can backend.
